articles.title: SPEND $1 TODAY, SAVE UP TO $2K ON YOUR NEXT VACATION
articles.summary: Ready to save up to $2,000 on every vacation for life? Dollar Flight Club has your back—TRY THE CLUB FOR JUST $1 IF YOU SIGN UP IN THE NEXT 12 HOURS [4]. That means; Hawaii from $174, Iceland from $215, or Greece from $245 round trip. Join over 1 million members saving on travel this year.

articles.title: GEOFF HINTON AND MAX WELLING $30M CARBON CAPTURE START UP
articles.summary: Geoff Hinton and Max Welling, preeminent researchers in the field of AI, have assembled a strong team and are working to build AI systems that help with material science for carbon capture.

articles.title: NVIDIA CONQUERS LATEST AI TESTS
articles.summary: Systems powered by Nvidia's Hopper architecture dominated the results of two new tests from MLPerf, an AI benchmarking suite that compares the fine-tuning of large language models and training of graph neural networks.

articles.title: PERPLEXITY AI SEARCHES FOR USERS IN JAPAN, VIA SOFTBANK DEAL
articles.summary: Perplexity is leveraging its strategic partnership with SoftBank to expand its reach in Japan. It is offering a free year of its premium AI-powered search engine, Perplexity Pro. SoftBank aims to attract users with AI services without developing in-house solutions. Perplexity, valued at $1 billion, is advancing its funding and investor base, which includes notable tech leaders and venture firms.

articles.title: UPDATING LANGUAGE MODELS WITH ERASE
articles.summary: ERASE is a new approach for updating language models. Unlike traditional methods that focus on improving retrieval during prediction, ERASE incrementally deletes or rewrites entries in the knowledge base when new documents are added.

articles.title: SUPER-RESOLUTION WITH CONTENT-AWARE MIXING
articles.summary: CAMixerSR performs image super-resolution by smartly applying convolution for simpler parts and deformable window-attention for detailed textures.

articles.title: COMPANIES CAN'T LEAK YOUR DATA IF THEY DON'T HAVE IT IN THE FIRST PLACE
articles.summary: Want to keep your personal details out of the next data breach? Start by not giving them to every nosy website. Protect your real identity with Surfshark VPN + Alternative ID for <$2.79/mo [12].

articles.title: META CHAMELEON MODELS RELEASED
articles.summary: Chameleon is an early fusion model that operates on images and text tokens simultaneously. Its team released the paper a few weeks ago. They have now released model checkpoints along with inference code.

articles.title: DEPTH COMPLETION
articles.summary: OGNI-DC is a new framework for depth completion using "Optimization-Guided Neural Iterations" (OGNI). It refines a depth gradient field and integrates the depth gradients into a depth map.

articles.title: SUBOBJECT TOKENIZATION FOR IMAGES
articles.summary: Subobject tokenization is a new way for vision models to understand images. Instead of breaking images into fixed square patches, models using subobject tokenization look at images in terms of meaningful segments, like parts of objects.

articles.title: OPEN INTERPRETER LOCAL III
articles.summary: Open source local agent Open Interpreter has just had a big upgrade. It can control the computer seamlessly and works completely offline and locally.

articles.title: INTRODUCING THE PROPERTY GRAPH INDEX
articles.summary: LlamaIndex introduces the Property Graph Index, enhancing knowledge graph capabilities with better modeling, storage, and querying features. The new index allows flexible construction of graphs, supports schema-guided, implicit, and free-form entity extraction, and integrates with vector databases for hybrid searches. It provides querying through keyword expansion, vector similarity, Cypher queries, and custom traversal.

articles.title: IBM GRANITE CODE MODELS
articles.summary: Open models with state-of-the-art code performance that do depth upscaling to initialize larger models. Unlike many code models, these models also excel at fixing code, explaining code, and evaluating areas for improvement.

articles.title: CLERK: MODERN AUTHENTICATION FOR AI APPLICATIONS
articles.summary: Bots and fraudulent sign-ups are wasting your time. Get back to innovation with Clerk's designed-for-AI login and permissions

articles.title: solution. Only pay for users active after 24 hours. Learn More
DECAGON RAISES $35M SERIES A FROM ACCEL + A16Z
articles.summary: Decagon is building human-like AI agents for customer support. It raised a $30M Series A from Accel and $5M Seed from a16z. Decagon's product handles global support for companies like Eventbrite, Rippling, Webflow, BILT, and Substack.

articles.title: FIREFUNCTION-V2 (HUGGING FACE HUB)
articles.summary: Open model that matches GPT4-o on function calling benchmarks trained on top of Llama 3 70B.

articles.title: HUBSPOT AI (PRODUCT)
articles.summary: Experience increased productivity and accelerated growth with AI-powered features integrated into the HubSpot customer platform.
